def persist_graph_json(G: nx.Graph, dest: Path) -> None:
    dest.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    data = graph_to_node_link(G)
    dest.write_text(json.dumps(data, indent=2), encoding="utf-8")
